title: streblus spinosus
intro: Streblus spinosus, also known as the Cannonball Tree or Satawar, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Streblus spinosus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create tonics and ointments for various ailments.
